Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The MipmapLevelCount method returns the number of mipmap levels that were created when the texture was allocated.
The value reflects the final allocation rather than only the value requested through SetTextureDimensions. Use it when iterating over valid levels for data upload, readback, or sampler configuration.

SubSection.Title: Return value
SubSection.ReturnValue: The number of allocated mipmap levels.
